violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Buffet style tables for food display and service not provided with sneeze protection.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Minor detail cleaning needed.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. Conveyor dish machine leaking water.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Pooling water from leaking dish machine.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
